subject: A young boy-presenting fusion warrior with distinctive two-tone hair (black base with a lighter tuft), wearing a black-and-white Metamoran fusion vest, in a combat-ready stance with yellow energy aura.
suspected_ip: Gotenks — Dragon Ball Z / Dragon Ball Super
description: A young, small-stature fusion fighter stands in a mid-shot composition with a confident, ready pose. The figure has two-tone hair with a darker base and a lighter prominent section — the distinctive look of the Gotenks fusion character. They wear the iconic black-and-white sleeveless Metamoran fusion vest with a white sash. A yellow-gold energy aura radiates around the figure. The background is bright with yellow and white energy. Despite the small frame, the stance conveys brash confidence. The card label 'SAMPLE' is visible, confirming this is a sample print image.
foreground: Young fusion fighter in black-and-white Metamoran vest, energy aura, confident stance
background: Bright yellow and white energy field
emotion: Cocky confidence — brash youth energy, chest forward, slightly smirking
